title: Approval of SOE Portfolio Performance Report Q4 2024
description: The Board resolved to approve the Q4 2024 SOE portfolio performance report and note the overall portfolio compliance score of 72%.

title: Approval of Eskom Debt Relief Monitoring Framework
description: The Board resolved to approve the enhanced monitoring framework for Eskom's R254 billion government debt relief programme, including quarterly reporting to National Treasury.

title: Appointment of Transaction Advisors — Denel Restructuring
description: The Board resolved to appoint PricewaterhouseCoopers as transaction advisors for the Denel SOC Limited strategic equity partnership process.

title: Approval of FY2025 Annual Budget
description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2025 annual budget of R485 million, including R120 million for SOE monitoring and oversight activities.
